items.title: Property Walk-Through POV Videos
items.summary: First-person perspective videos where agents guide viewers through homes as if they're walking through themselves, often set to trending audio and shot in 15-60 second clips. This immersive format drives engagement because viewers feel like they're personally touring the property, making it easier to visualize themselves living there and boosting save rates for follow-up interest.

items.title: Before-and-After Staging Transformations
items.summary: Quick-cut reels showing empty or poorly furnished rooms transformed into photogenic, move-in-ready spaces, typically compressed into 30-second videos with split-screen or swipe transitions. These perform exceptionally well because they showcase the power of design and create shareable, satisfying visual content that audiences find both educational and aspirational.

items.title: Market Insight Story Series
items.summary: Multi-part Instagram Stories or TikTok video sequences breaking down local market data, interest rate changes, and neighborhood statistics into digestible 15-second clips with on-screen text and simple graphics. This positions agents as trusted local experts and drives engagement through educational value, while the series format encourages viewers to stay tuned for the next installment.

asreLab.headline: ASRE Lab
asreLab.tipHeadline: Send Mother's Day texts from a smarter starting point
asreLab.tip: Pick five past clients you have not connected with in 90 days. Feed Claude their name, the month they closed with you, and one detail you remember. Ask for a no-sales Mother's Day text in your voice. Send all five before tonight. Reply rates on personal-touch outreach run 3 to 5 times higher than mass send. Watch what comes back.
